title: The Missing Main Effect of Welfare State Regimes: A Replication of ‘Social Policy Responsiveness in Developed Democracies’ by Brooks and Manza
abstract: Nate Breznau Sociological Science, August 17, 2015 DOI 10.15195/v2.a20 Abstract This article reports the results of a replication of Brooks and Manza's Social Policy Responsiveness in Developed Democracies published in 2006 in the American Sociological Review.
